processing_note: Orders are usually processed within 24–48 hours. You'll get tracking by email when your package ships. Flat local rate is set in /admin site settings.
return_policy_items: 30-day window for unopened journals and unused stickers.
Refund to original payment or store credit — message us on Messenger with photos.
Digital products are non-refundable once downloaded.
custom_order_note: Personalized notebooks may need an extra 3–5 days.
lost_parcel_note: We help track stalled shipments — reach out with your order ref.
bulk_shipping_note: Events & workshops — special rates for 20+ items.
